posts.caption:
Suno's training data sourced from YouTube, Deezer, and Genius — without disclosed consent. Leaked data reveals the AI music generator scraped millions of songs from major platforms, reigniting fair use debates for artists and rights holders alike. The details are messy, and the implications for music creators are significant.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AIMusic #Suno #MusicRights #FairUse #ArtificialIntelligence #CreatorRights

story.title: Suno trained on millions of scraped songs from YouTube, Deezer, Genius
story.dek: Leaked data reveals the AI music generator sourced training material from major platforms without disclosed consent, raising fair use questions for creators and platforms.

posts.caption:
TikTok is testing an opt-in tool that detects AI-generated likenesses of creators — think deepfakes and synthetic impersonations — and lets them report violations directly. It mirrors YouTube's existing detection feature, signaling that likeness protection is becoming table stakes across major platforms. Creators get more control; bad actors get fewer places to hide.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#TikTok #AIRights #CreatorEconomy #DeepfakeDetection #ArtificialIntelligence

story.title: TikTok testing AI likeness detection tool for creators
story.dek: TikTok is piloting an opt-in tool to detect AI-generated likenesses of creators and enable reporting. The feature mirrors YouTube's similar detection capability, offering creators protection against synthetic impersonation.

posts.caption:
San Francisco is going after AI nudify apps directly at the source. The city sent cease-and-desist letters to Apple and Google demanding removal of 13 apps that generate non-consensual explicit images from ordinary photos. It's one of the most direct government actions yet targeting this category of harm.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AIPolicy #NonConsensualImagery #AppStore #AIRegulation #DigitalRights

story.title: San Francisco orders removal of AI nudify apps from app stores
story.dek: Apple and Google received cease-and-desist letters to remove 13 nudification apps that use AI to create non-consensual explicit images from ordinary photos.

posts.caption:
NVIDIA and Hugging Face just dropped NeMo Automodel — a joint toolkit that brings large-scale fine-tuning to video and image diffusion models. It supports FLUX checkpoints out of the box, plus LoRA examples for efficient adaptation. Serious infrastructure for anyone training at scale.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#NVIDIA #HuggingFace #DiffusionModels #LoRA #AITools #GenerativeAI

story.title: NVIDIA NeMo Automodel enables large-scale video and image model fine-tuning
story.dek: NVIDIA and Hugging Face joint effort adds fine-tuning at scale for video and image diffusion models, including support for FLUX checkpoints and LoRA examples.

posts.caption:
Google just open-sourced GNM Head, a parametric 3D human head model with 170+ controls for adjusting expression, pose, and facial variation. It was trained on real 3D scans — not AI-generated data — and ships with a free Blender add-on for immediate use. Clean, production-ready, and actually free.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio

#AITools #3DModeling #GoogleAI #Blender #GenerativeAI #OpenSource

story.title: Google open-sources GNM Head, parametric 3D human head model
story.dek: Google releases generative anthropomorphic 3D head model (170+ controls, expression/pose adjustable) with free Blender add-on; trained on 3D scans, not AI-generated but explicitly generative for facial variation.

posts.caption:
Patreon just upgraded from 'please don't' to 'you can't.' The platform has moved beyond robots.txt guidelines and is now actively blocking AI training bots through Cloudflare enforcement — meaning scrapers get denied at the door, not just politely asked to leave. It's a meaningful shift in how creator platforms defend content as bots get smarter.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio

#Patreon #AIRights #CreatorEconomy #AIScraping #Cloudflare

story.title: Patreon blocks AI scraping with Cloudflare enforcement
story.dek: Patreon is actively blocking AI training bots via Cloudflare, shifting from passive robots.txt rules to direct access denial as scraping tactics grow more sophisticated.
